title: International School (Primary & Secondary) Teacher
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Knightsbridge House International School is one of the fastest-growing international schools in Singapore. We believe education should be a right and not a privilege. Everything we do is centered around providing world-class educational experiences and outcomes for our students that are truly affordable, accessible and of high quality.

Job Summary

International School Homeroom Teacher

Responsibilities

  • Deliver the Cambridge curriculum in Mathematics, English, or Science by applying subject matter expertise to design and execute engaging lessons for students aged 5 to 14 years
  • Manage homeroom classes by fostering positive relationships with students and parents to support a collaborative learning environment
  • Monitor and assess student progress and attainment within your subject area to inform instructional strategies and improve learning outcomes
  • Communicate effectively with parents and school stakeholders to report on student development and address learning needs

Required competencies and certifications

  • Hold a First Aid Certificate to ensure student safety and respond effectively to emergencies
  • Possess a Registered Teacher Qualification such as QTS or an equivalent credential to meet professional teaching standards

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Degree in education demonstrating foundational knowledge in teaching methodologies and child development
  • Minimum of 2 years’ experience as a Homeroom Teacher in an international school setting to deliver curriculum and manage classroom dynamics effectively
  • At least 5 years of prior experience in an international school environment preferred to contribute to school culture and student success

Other Information

  • Job Type: Full-time, Permanent
  • Schedule: Monday to Friday
  • Work Location: In person
  • Benefits: Health insurance

postedCompany.description:
An International Cambridge Accredited School for Parents Seeking High-Quality, Affordable Education in Singapore.

The school offers the Cambridge International Curriculum for Year 1 (age 5) to Year 13 A Levels (age 18).

The school was founded by John Fearon. Mr .Fearon is also the founder of the Invictus Group of schools. Knightsbridge House Management Team is very experienced in providing affordable quality education in Asia Pacific.

Since Knightsbridge House was founded in 2021 the school has grown to 600 students. It has two campuses in Singapore (Bukit Merah and Changi), one campus in Thailand and one coming soon in Japan.

KBH is a proud provider of affordable quality education. Fees are as low as $13080 and have not been increased for 4 years whilst never compromising on quality and world class educational outcomes.

For example KBH achieved the highest average test scores globally for the Cambridge Year 7 MIDYIS assessment for three years in a row: 2022-2023, 2023-2024 and 2024-2025 school years. See https://www.kbh.edu.sg/cambridge-year7-results. The school has excellent Mathematics results in particular, the school achieved joint first-place in Singapore Mathematics Challenge 2025. Special mention must be made of the KBH Year 9 Checkpoint Mathematics results in particular where KBH students scored an average of 81%. See https://www.kbh.edu.sg/cambridge-year-9-checkpoint-examination-results-2025.

Students at KBH are immersed in a multicultural, inclusive, and collaborative community that fosters a nurturing learning environment where all students grow to their fullest potential.
postedCompany.name: KNIGHTSBRIDGE HOUSE INTERNATIONAL SCHOOL PTE. LTD.
